title: Query with CASE and nested functions results in very long execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id Int32, name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT IF(age IS NULL, 'Unknown', name) AS user_name FROM users;
SELECT IF(id = 1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users), (SELECT AVG(age) FROM users)) AS result FROM users;
key_bug_features: Query with CASE and nested functions
